boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action on approved existing payment rail
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current source-control records close the exact boundary; control record is current, exact, and tied
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains open before execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Bank rail effective date precedes invoice release and matches the requested scope

final_answer: Source records close the exact action boundary. SRC-F05CA8402464-CTL states the bank rail effective date precedes invoice release and is tied to the requested action. SRC-F05CA8402464-POL requires execution when current source records close the boundary, and communication tone does not override control records. No open source defect remains, so the action may proceed.
